item.title: spitr 0.5.1
item.description:
ci: tag-triggered auto-release via GitHub Actions
Push a version tag (or run the workflow manually) and a macOS runner builds, code-signs, EdDSA-signs, and publishes the release + appcast to the public spitr-releases repo — the same make release pipeline, in CI.
- .github/workflows/release.yml: imports the spitr-dev cert into a temp keychain, writes the Sparkle key from a secret, derives version/notes from the tag, runs make-release.sh - make-release.sh: when SPARKLE_ED_KEY_FILE / RELEASES_REPO_TOKEN are set (CI) it signs from the key file and pushes via the token; otherwise uses the keychain + local gh auth as before (verified file-signing yields a byte-identical signature) - README: Continuous release (CI) section with the four required secrets and how to produce them; reiterates backing keys up to a password manager
Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

item.title: spitr 0.5.0
item.description: Auto-updates (Sparkle), in-app Settings, transcript history, frosted-glass HUD with hands-free dictation and TTS controls, and stability fixes.
